title: Ribbits: Croaks
description: An extension to the popular Ribbits mod, that adds rival frogs (Croaks), and more!
body:
![Ribbits: Croaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67752eb4809464becb58c0cbeb25a5485e92fb7a.png) ![4 Ribbit Guys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d81dbf8a3d3d8f17c9fcf91e911397d58fbe7a46.png)



Ribbits: Croaks will add evil variants of the Ribbits, so you'll have to defend your Ribbit village from them!
Make Ribbot Crates to summon a Ribbot, a new mob to help defend the Ribbits!

This mod also adds a variety of new blocks. Polished and Brick Amethyst, Rotten Wood, and more!
Craft Song of the Ribbits music disc, to listen to the Ribbit's jam whenever!
Craft a **Flask of Boggy Bane** using **Blumelight Dust**, a **Glass bottle**, and an **Amethyst Core**. By drinking this and getting the **Boggy Bane** effect, going near a **Ribbit Village** will start a **Croak Raid**.

![Flask of Boggy Bane Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2c7def8bacf52584d518c156d7a57abf3eb75bb.png)
Swamps can be quite tricky to navigate through, and it can be easy to lose one or two Croaks.
Because of this, it's reccomended that you craft an Amethyst Bell to make nearby Croaks glow!

![Amethyst Bell Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54b47f2ef8794913d4710136e9d7c3b17b9fce0.png)



**Josh/Joosh, yungnickyoung, HellionGames, wesleybenjamin, Scratchy, joakota, & joshesque - The Original Ribbits Mod, Art, Models, & Music** Jonahanoj - Code, Some Art
usernameusermane - Art & Models
Kyoukster's MCreator tutorials helped a ton.
Mod made in **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)**
Models made in **[Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/)**
Animations possible with [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) through [Nerdy's Geckolib Plugin](https://mcreator.net/plugin/91484/nerdys-geckolib-plugin-forge-1182-1192)
